docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAHN, LINDA SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-17-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAHN, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1607 GROVE ST., SF., CA. $4,800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,800.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-12-2003 CONTINUED TO NOV-12-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN 305.

SETTLEMENT CONF. HELD. PARTIES REACH SETTLEMENT: PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1607 GROVE ST., SF., CA. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL JAN. 31, 2004. BY 5 PM, NOV. 13, 2003, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF $2,400 TO REFLECT ALL RENTS AND DAMAGES THROUGH NOV. 30, 2003 BY MONEY ORDER TO PLAINTIFF AT 254 ROOSEVELT WAY, SF. ON OR BEFORE DEC. 1, 2003, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $1,200 BY CASH OR MONEY ORDER FOR DEC. 2003. ON OR BEFORE JAN. 2, 2004, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $1,200 FOR JAN., 2004. IF DEFENDANT IS MORE THAN ONE DAY LATE WITH ANY PAYMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL APPLY TO THE COURT FOR AN IMMEDIATE REMOVAL OF STAY. ANY PROPERTY REMAINING SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF PLAINTIFF. AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. SECURITY DEPOSITS SHALL BE RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF. IF VACATED BY JAN. 31, 2004, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES MUTUALLY RELEASE FROM ANY CLAIMS. JUDGE, PAUL H. ALVARADO;REPORTER, BOB BALIAN;CLERK, T.MARUYAMA (DEPT. 305)
MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 305
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-17-2003. SETTLED.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAHN, LINDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAHN, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
